description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house set on a spacious, landscaped lot with a rectangular swimming pool in the backyard. The house features a white exterior with multiple gabled roof sections and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The property is bordered by hedges and trees, providing privacy and greenery, and includes a driveway with two parked cars leading to a garage. The backyard is expansive, with a well-maintained lawn and a pool area that includes a paved deck. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, and the main entryway is accentuated by steps, a covered porch, and decorative shrubbery. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern suburban architectural elements.
description: A large, white two-story house with a gabled roof, front porch, garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with cars, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the transition to the backyard with the pool visible in the distance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive backyard, swimming pool, and the back facade of the house with a deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and a clear view of the backyard and pool area.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch supported by columns, and decorative shrubbery.
